criteria_verification.criterion_text: Defines `DispatchError(BaseModel)` with `category: Literal["unresolved","invalid_payload","invalid_timeout","timeout","specialist_error","transport_stub"]`, `detail: str`, `agent_id: str | None`, `tool_name: str | None`, `correlation_id: str`, and `to_tool_string() -> str` method rendering `"ERROR: <category> — <detail>"` or `"TIMEOUT: ..."` per ADR-ARCH-021 conventions.
criteria_verification.evidence: DispatchError declared in src/jarvis/tools/types.py with the six-member Literal category, detail, optional agent_id/tool_name, required correlation_id. to_tool_string() returns 'TIMEOUT: timeout — <detail>' for category=='timeout' and 'ERROR: <category> — <detail>' otherwise (em-dash separator per ADR-ARCH-021). Tests parametrise the five non-timeout categories asserting the ERROR prefix and dedicated test asserts the TIMEOUT prefix; invalid category strings are rejected by Pydantic validation.

Tests parametrise the five non-timeout categories asserting the ERROR prefix and dedicated test asserts the TIMEOUT prefix; invalid category strings are rejected by Pydantic validation.
